title: Ebab
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Ebab.png]] |name=Ebab |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]][[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=*[[Color/Legends|Taupe]] *White {{C|[[Hair/Legends|mustache]]}} |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Bright Tree Village tribe]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|ZZZ…No one may…ZZZ…enter while Ebab…ZZ…is on guard…|Ebab, asleep on the job|}} '''Ebab''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he was tasked with guarding an Ewok artifact known as the [[bridge crystal]], but he fell [[Sleep/Legends|asleep]] on the job and the [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] was stolen. The next [[Standard day/Legends|day]], he ran over to [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] in order to inform him of the proceedings and apologize for allowing the crystal to be unguarded. ==Biography== {{Quote|Forgive me, I am an old fool, Chief Chirpa! I dozed and…''"
"''Speak up, Ebab, what ''is'' it?|Ebab and Chirpa|}} [[File:EbabGuard.jpg|thumb|right|275px|Ebab sleeps while guarding the crystal.]] Ebab was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] member of the [[Bright Tree Village tribe]] in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which include the events of [[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' 1]], to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Ebab was tasked with guarding the [[bridge crystal]], a powerful artifact that could be used to produce the [[Rainbow Bridge]] and was stored in the [[Council Hut]]. One night, the [[Youngling/Legends|young]] Ewok scouts [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]] and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] attempted to steal the [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] in order to use it to find a cure for their ailing friend, [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]]. The pair entered the hut through a trapdoor in the roof by lowering themselves with a rope, where they found Ebab snoring in his [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]], mumbling about how no one was permitted to enter during his guard. Warrick and Teebo successfully retrieved the crystal and left the hut. The next morning, Ebab rushed to the [[Royal Hut|home]] of [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] to alert him of the theft. He prefaced the warning by asking Chirpa for forgiveness for his blunder, explaining that he had dozed off. Chirpa asked him to speak up, and Ebab stammered that the rainbow crystal had been stolen, which shocked the Ewok chief. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|T-the ''rainbow crystal''…i-it is ''stolen!''''"
"No?!''|Ebab and Chirpa|}} Ebab was old by 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and fell asleep when he was required to guard the bridge crystal. Once he realized what he had done, he asked for Chirpa's forgiveness. Ebab had [[Color/Legends|taupe]]-colored [[Hair/Legends|fur]] and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He also sported a white mustache. ==Equipment== Ebab wore green [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] and utilized a [[Spear/Legends|spear]]. ==Behind the scenes== Ebab appeared in the [[Ewoks (1985) 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[David Manak]], illustrated by [[Warren Kremer]], and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[January 29]], [[1985]].{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 25|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[April]] [[1985]]}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ebab}} *[[Ewoks (1985) 1|''Ewoks'' (1985) 1]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bright Tree tribe]] [[Category:Ewoks]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
